channel.title: The Daily
channel.description: This is what the news should sound like.

item.title: Why Even Some Democrats Hate California’s Billionaire Tax Proposal
item.description: A landmark proposal for a one-time tax on billionaires in California recently reached a milestone.
item.author: thedaily@nytimes.com (The New York Times)
item.content:encoded: A landmark proposal for a one-time tax on billionaires in California recently reached a milestone.
item.itunes:title: Why Even Some Democrats Hate California’s Billionaire Tax Proposal
item.itunes:author: The New York Times
item.itunes:summary: The measure calls for placing a one-time 5 percent tax on the assets of California residents with at least $1.1 billion.

item.title: Assassination Attempt Suspect Charged
item.description: What we know about the man in custody after the shooting at the White House correspondents’ dinner.
item.author: thedaily@nytimes.com (The New York Times)
item.content:encoded: What we know about the man in custody after the shooting at the White House correspondents’ dinner.
item.itunes:title: Assassination Attempt Suspect Charged
item.itunes:author: The New York Times
item.itunes:summary: What we know about the man in custody after the shooting at the White House correspondents’ dinner.
